response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows or in capital markets/fixed income domains; their C++ exposure is limited to an academic thesis and NI LabWindows, with no evidence of financial systems, SQL Server/Oracle, or Windows-specific development required for the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with diverse tech experience
Proven ability to build and contribute to open-source infrastructure
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: No professional C++ development on Windows platform as required
No experience in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domains
SQL experience listed but no evidence of SQL Server or Oracle usage in financial contexts
